productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Olive Handbag
description: A perfect blend of practicality and style, this bag from lino perros comes in a combination of fabric and glossy synthetic leather, and has copious space to hold your essentials safely. Outer made of synthetic fabric with stitch detailing and glossy synthetic leather Woven rounded handles for style Removable handles with two loops to customise handle length One main zippered compartment further secured by a magnetic clasp button, and has two zippered compartments on either side Two organiser pouches and one zippered pouch inside the main compartment Branded zippers and sliders for durability Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
